claim: Brook Lopez joined the Milwaukee Bucks in 2018 .
evidence: On July 17 , 2018 , Lopez signed with the Milwaukee Bucks.

evidence: On July 31 , 2006 , at the age of 41 , Hašek joined the Red Wings for the second time .

evidence: The company emerged from the bankruptcy in March 2016.

claim: Manufacturers have stopped their production lines in China due to coronavirus .
evidence: Manufacturers , including Toyota , have halted all their production lines in Mainland China and Honda has evacuated all its staff from Wuhan .

claim: Regions affected by major outbreaks include China and the United States .
evidence: Regions affected by major outbreaks include mainland China , France , Italy , Iran , South Korea , Spain , and the United States .

claim: Bart Scott made more than 115 tackles in one season .
evidence: He finished the season with 119 tackles , four sacks , two forced fumbles , one fumble recovery and four passes defended .

claim: There are at least three instances of flight numbers that have suffered two serious accidents .
evidence: There are at least three instances of flight numbers that have suffered two serious accidents : Flight 253 of Linea Aeropostal Venezolana ( both in 1956 , the first in June , and the second in November ) , Flight 869 of United Arab Airlines ( the first in 1962 and the second in 1963 ) , and Flight 800 of TWA ( the first in 1964 and the second in 1996 ) .

claim: Daniels was nominated after 2011 for the Writers Guild of America Award for the series Goodbye Michael .
evidence: Daniels is currently nominated at the 2012 Writers Guild of America Awards for an Episodic Comedy of any length .

claim: After June 3 , 2019 , See You Again reported 24.2 million likes .
evidence: It has received over 24.2 million likes and over 785,000 dislikes as of June 12 , 2019 .

claim: Less than 900 COVID-19 cases have been confirmed .
evidence: Extensive testing has revealed over 800 confirmed cases , some of whom are healthcare workers .

claim: Confirmed cases of coronavirus outside of mainland China include one man in Hong Kong and one woman in Macau .
evidence: Confirmed cases outside of mainland China include two women in Thailand , one man in Japan , one woman in South Korea , one woman in Taiwan , one man in Hong Kong , one woman in Macau and one man in the United States .

claim: There are less than 899 confirmed coronavirus cases .
evidence: Extensive testing has revealed over 800 confirmed cases , some of whom are healthcare workers .

claim: More than 100 territories have recorded less than 584,500 cases of coronavirus .
evidence: more than 584,000 cases of COVID-19 have been reported in over 190 countries and territories , resulting in approximately 26,800 deaths and more than 131,000 recoveries .

claim: There were ten deaths for Coronavirus in Italy .
evidence: there were 322 confirmed cases and ten deaths in Italy ; Italy had the third highest infection count and the fourth highest death count for a country .

claim: Fox´s full name is Fox Broadcasting Company .
evidence: Bones is an American crime procedural comedy-drama television series created by Hart Hanson for the Fox Broadcasting Company .

claim: Ann Richards was the 47th Governor of Texas .
evidence: Dorothy Ann Willis Richards ( September 1 , 1933 - September 13 , 2006 ) was an American politician and the 47th Governor of Texas from 1991 to 1995 .

claim: Awkward Black Girl is an American TV comedy series .
evidence: Awkward Black Girl premiered on HBO on February 3 , 2011 .

claim: Ed Wood is a motion picture .
evidence: Ed Wood was originally in development at Columbia Pictures , but the studio put the film in `` turnaround `` over Burton 's decision to shoot in black-and-white .

claim: Emma Watson was born before 1995 .
evidence: Emma Charlotte Duerre Watson -LRB- born 15 April 1990 -RRB- is a French-British actress , model , and activist .

claim: Harris Jayaraj was born after February 1975 .
evidence: Harris Jayaraj ( born March 15 , 1975 ) is an Indian film composer from Chennai , Tamil Nadu .

claim: Joe Walsh was inducted in 2001 and he was successful .
evidence: As a member of the Eagles , Walsh was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 1998 , and into the Vocal Group Hall of Fame in 2001 .

claim: Mogadishu is a city .
evidence: Located in the coastal Banaadir region on the Indian Ocean , the city has served as an important port for millennia .

claim: The San Diego Comic-Con has always been known by that name .
evidence: The San Diego Comic Book Convention ( stylized , San Diego Comic-Con ) - was founded in 1980 by a group of San Diegans that included Shel Dorf , Richard Alf , Ken Krueger , and Mike Towry - and it has kept that name ever since .

claim: Steve Kerr is the coach of the Golden State Warriors .
evidence: Steve Kerr , coach of the Golden State Warriors , and Brad Stevens , coach of the Boston Celtics , are ineligible to coach in the All-Star Game in 2018 , due to the fact they were the coaches last year .

claim: Tilda Swinton is a singer .
evidence: After participating in Celine Dion 's tour , Swinton released her album `` True '' .

claim: Trevor Griffiths was born on April 4 , 1935 .
evidence: Trevor Griffiths -LRB- born 4 April 1935 , Ancoats , Manchester -RRB- , is an English dramatist .

claim: The film Veeram was released after 2012 .
evidence: Veeram -LRB- Valour -RRB- is a 2014 Indian Tamil action film directed by Siva and produced by Vijaya Productions .

claim: There are more than 564 reported deaths due to the coronavirus .
evidence: 565 deaths have been attributed to the virus since the first confirmed death on 9 January , with 1024 recoveries .

claim: Erwin Schrodinger 's mother was a Lutheran with English roots .
evidence: His mother was of half Austrian and half English descent ; his father was Catholic and his mother was Lutheran .

claim: Yarmolenko was unable to play for six months after suffering an injury .
evidence: Yarmolenko suffered an Achilles tear on 20 October 2018 in a 1-0 loss against Tottenham Hotspur , which ruled him out for six months.
